user.title: Select Protocol
user.description: Choose the protocol for this device.

modbus_common.title: Modbus Hub Configuration
modbus_common.description: Configure the Modbus hub connection. Devices (slaves) are added in the next step.

modbus_serial.title: Modbus Serial Configuration
modbus_serial.description: Serial port settings for the hub.

modbus_device.title: First Modbus Device (Slave)
modbus_device.description: Configure the first device on this hub. You can add more devices later via options.

data.first_register_size: Number of Registers to Read (for connection test)

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the device. Check settings and network/port access.

data_description.name: Unique name for this entity
data_description.data_type: How to interpret the raw value
data_description.read_mode: Get: single value; Walk: full subtree (SNMP only)
data_description.format: Optional string in json format to tranform value
data_description.options: Optional JSON creating select entity (specify dict in json braces)

data_description.name: Unique name for this entity
data_description.data_type: How to interpret the raw value
data_description.format: Optional string in json format to tranform value
data_description.options: Optional JSON creating select entity (specify dict in json braces)

load_template.title: Load Device Template
load_template.description: Select a device template to load. Available templates are shown in the dropdown below.

error.template_empty_or_duplicate: Template contains no new entities or all are duplicates.

read_register.name: Read Register
read_register.description: Read a Modbus register and optionally decode it.

raw.name: Raw Mode
raw.description: Return raw register values instead of decoded

write_register.name: Write Register
write_register.description: Write a value to a Modbus register with proper encoding.

value.name: Value
value.description: Value to write (packed according to data type)

register_type.name: Register Type
register_type.description: Type of register to write to

data_type.name: Data Type
data_type.description: How the value should be encoded

read_snmp.name: Read SNMP OID
read_snmp.description: Read an SNMP OID from an SNMP device.

data_type.name: Data Type
data_type.description: Expected data type of the OID value

write_snmp.name: Write SNMP OID
write_snmp.description: Write a value to an SNMP OID.

error.no_devices_found: No BACnet devices discovered. Try manual entry.
error.discovery_timeout: Device discovery timed out. Check network and try again.
error.discovery_failed: Discovery failed. Check network or use manual entry.
error.invalid_input: Invalid input values. Check device ID and network number.

bacnet_common.title: BACnet Connection Method
bacnet_common.description: Choose how to configure your BACnet device. Discovery will scan your network for BACnet/IP devices.

bacnet_discover.title: Discovered BACnet Devices
bacnet_discover.description: Select a BACnet device from the list. Found {count} devices.

bacnet_template.title: BACnet Template Selection
bacnet_template.description: Optionally select a template to pre-configure entities for this device.
